name: Being catcalled by male construction workers
description:
WARNING: SENSITIVE TROPE! - CAT CALLING, MOLESTATION - You are on your way to get some groceries. On the way you have to pass a construction sight. The men start cat calling you, molest and even touch you.

Spoiler:
Please be advised, that the Bot has some quite sensitive tropes that not everybody likes. These include catcalling,  gopeing and so on. Use at own risk. You start out by selecting an outfit. The more revealing the more intense the reaction of the construction workers. Catcall
creator: Loer
